languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

languages.text: "Мон-кай придают так много значения вещам, которые сами же наделили значимостью... и теперь исчезновение такого предмета холодит ваши сердца смертным ужасом".
"Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."
languages.original_text: "Мон-кай придают так много значения вещам, которые сами же наделили значимостью... и теперь исчезновение такого предмета холодит ваши сердца смертным ужасом".

traits.locale_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."
"Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."
"Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

languages.text: 「モノケイは、自分たちが意味を与えたものに重きを置く。そして、そのモノが消えた今、あなたは死の恐怖に慄く」
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: 「モノケイは、自分たちが意味を与えたものに重きを置く。そして、そのモノが消えた今、あなたは死の恐怖に慄く。」

languages.text: « Les mon-keigh accordent une importance démesurée à des choses qui n'ont de valeur que parce qu'ils leur en ont donné... et maintenant, la disparition d'une telle chose emplit vos cœurs d'une terreur glaciale. »
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: « Les mon-keigh accordent une importance démesurée à des choses qui n'ont de valeur que parce qu'ils leur en ont donné... et maintenant, la disparition d'une telle chose emplit vos cœurs d'une terreur glaciale. »

languages.text: "Chem-Pan-Sey messen Dingen, die sie mit Bedeutung belegt haben, einen viel zu hohen Stellenwert bei ... und nun erfüllt das Verschwinden eines solchen Objektes Eure Herzen mit sterblichem Entsetzen."
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: "Chem-Pan-Sey messen Dingen, die sie mit Bedeutung belegt haben, einen viel zu hohen Stellenwert bei ... und nun erfüllt das Verschwinden eines solchen Objektes Eure Herzen mit sterblichem Entsetzen."

languages.text: "Mon-keighler bizzat kendilerinin anlam yüklediği nesnelere çok fazla önem atfediyor... Şimdi böyle bir nesnenin kaybolması, kalplerinizi ölümcül bir dehşetle donduruyor."
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: "Mon-keighler bizzat kendilerinin anlam yüklediği nesnelere çok fazla önem atfediyor... Şimdi böyle bir nesnenin kaybolması, kalplerinizi ölümcül bir dehşetle donduruyor."

languages.text: «Los mon-keigh atribuyen demasiada importancia a cosas materiales que ellos mismos imbuyen de significado... y ahora la desaparición de uno de esos objetos os infunde un pánico cerval».
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: «Los mon-keigh atribuyen demasiada importancia a cosas materiales que ellos mismos imbuyen de significado... y ahora la desaparición de uno de esos objetos os infunde un pánico cerval».

languages.text: “猴子总对自己凭空赋予意义的事物过分执着……如今这样一件东西消失了，便让你们的心灵因凡俗的恐惧而颤栗。”
languages.original_text: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."

traits.locale_text: “猴子总对自己凭空赋予意义的事物过分执着……如今这样一件东西消失了，便让你们的心灵因凡俗的恐惧而颤栗。”
